objective: Download configured public BED gzip interval files, merge intervals within 500 bp, and count merged domains longer than 5 kb.
approvalSummary: User approved raw-data download and compute in this Codex thread on 2026-05-11; pilot is capped below 2 MB download and 10 MB storage.
boundedScopeNote: This pilot starts from deposited GEO peak BED files, not FASTQ/BAM alignment, so it tests the configured interval-domain rule and perturbation direction but not peak-caller reproducibility.
degradationStrategy: If configured public files become unavailable, keep the prior bounded reproduction artifacts and mark this raw pilot as needs-human rather than inferring success.
verdictRationale: The approved raw BED domain pilot downloaded configured public interval files ({labels}) and independently applied the configured merge and width rule. {interpretation} This supports the bounded claim slice without upgrading the whole paper claim to reproduced.

parameters.input: Configured public BED gzip interval files

comparison.interpretation: RS4 Setd1bKO has far fewer selected >5 kb H3K4me3 merged domains than RS4 WT under the configured merge/width rule.

sourceRefs.summary: SETD1B broad H3K4me3 claim graph locator.
Official GEO Series page for GSE242515.

dataset.title: GSE242515 RS4 WT and Setd1bKO H3K4me3 GEO peak BED files
dataset.licenseSummary: GEO accession is public and files are accessed from official NCBI FTP; redistribution remains refs-first.
dataset.license: Public GEO access; downloaded objects remain in workspace refs and are not vendored into git.

sourceRef.summary: Official GEO Series page for GSE242515.

dataset.accessInstructions: Use official NCBI GEO FTP supplementary peak BED gzip files for GSE242515; verify checksums before running the merge/count step.
notes: Pilot uses GEO supplementary peak BED gzip files instead of full FASTQ/BAM alignment to keep N4 bounded and auditable.

identifierVerifications.title: SETD1B-mediated broad H3K4me3 controls proper temporal patterns of gene expression critical for spermatid development

evidenceRefs.summary: GEO page links the study title and PubMed id.
Official GEO Series page for GSE242515.

limitations: The pilot uses deposited interval BED files, not full raw FASTQ/BAM alignment and peak calling.
It checks one configured stage/mark contrast; it does not prove all temporal expression or Pol II mechanism claims.

missingEvidenceRefs.summary: Full FASTQ/BAM alignment and peak-calling reproduction remains outside this one-claim pilot.

missingEvidence.summary: Full reproduction still requires FASTQ/BAM-level alignment, peak calling, replicate handling, and broad-domain calling across all relevant stages and controls.
